Maps.Description: It's the Temple where the Goddess of Time resides.  The past, present and future all exist in this place.
It's a bowman town on a wide prairie, and you can choose to become a bowman here.
It's a magician town surrounded by the forest, and you can choose to become a magician here.
It's a warrior town located at the high mountainous area, and you can choose to become a warrior here.
It's a thief town in the middle of the city where the sun sets. You can choose to become a thief here.
The port city in Victoria Island. Enables one to travel to different cities.

Maps.Description: It's a bowman town on a wide prairie, and you can choose to become a bowman here.
It's a magician town surrounded by the forest, and you can choose to become a magician here.
It's a warrior town located at the high mountainous area, and you can choose to become a warrior here.
It's a thief town in the middle of the city where the sun sets. You can choose to become a thief here.
The port city in Victoria Island. Enables one to travel to different cities.
A town centered around a legendary Oasis in the middle of the desert. The King and Queen recently constructed a Coliseum where competitive warriors can show their skills...
A desert town whose culture revolves around the study of Alchemy. Two alchemist societies, Zenumist and Alcadno, are in conflict.
The harbor where Nautilus is at anchor. One will be able to become a dauntless pirate here.
It's the Temple where the Goddess of Time resides.  The past, present and future all exist in this place.
The Island of Empress Cygnus. It usually floats all over Maple World but it is currently stationary.
A tiny island that is covered in snow and ice.
The town for beginners. Playing the game through simple quests\r\nYou'll learn how to move around here.
A town specifically for beginners. Simple quests teach the basic controls of the game.
A town located on the east side of Maple Island. Contains shops that sell weapons, armors, and general goods.
It's a town located at the east of Maple Island, and it has various stores like weapon store, armor store, and department stores.
A port city on the south side of the island. The place where people head over to experience the world outside Maple Island.
A tiny island that is covered in snow and ice.
